title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0732
summary: 1 After a turbulent nine months of trial, eleven Communist Party leaders were convicted of violating the Smith Act, 18 U.S.C.A. § 2385.1 On receiving the verdict, the trial judge at once filed a certificate under Rule 42(a), Fed.Rules Crim.Proc., 18 U.S.C.A., finding petitioners guilty of crimina...
